name: SessionsApi
summary: Bluebeam Studio API — Sessions endpoints. Auto-generated REST surface; one method per HTTP operation.

methods.name: CreateSession
methods.remarks: HTTP POST `/publicapi/v1/sessions`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: Name, Notification, Restricted, SessionEndDate.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ListSessions
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/sessions`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: GetSession
methods.summary: Get a single Studio Session metadata
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/sessions/{id}`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: UpdateSession
methods.remarks: HTTP PUT `/publicapi/v1/sessions/{id}`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: Name, Notification, OwnerEmailOrId, Restricted, SessionEndDate, Status.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: DeleteSession
methods.remarks: HTTP DELETE `/publicapi/v1/sessions/{id}`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: InviteSession
methods.summary: Invite user to Studio Session by email
methods.remarks: HTTP POST `/publicapi/v1/sessions/{sessionId}/invite`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: Email, Message.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.
